name: S-18 consumption trace records consulted-compliance source ids per the C-19 cross-loop contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q 'soc2-tsc' trace.json && echo recorded 1>&2
